name: BioLife Remedies, Inc.
summary: BioLife Remedies, Inc. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells medical and healthcare products to treat various serious diseases. It offers various natural herbal supplements, including Zutrol for diabetics to decrease frequent bathroom trips and urination, improve deteriorating vision, and increase circulation in the legs and feet; Betatrol for preventing diabetes; DIA-X for men with erectile dysfunction from diabetes; DIA-KIDS for children with diabetes to prevent dangerous weight gain; and CHOLESSRA for men and women with high cholesterol. The company's products are used treat various diseases, such as diabetes, prostatitis, osteoporosis, cerebrovascular disease, cardiac vascular disease, hypertension, menopausal syndrome, male and female sexual disorders, and intelligence development in children. It sells its products through its website. BioLife Remedies, Inc. was founded in 2005 and is based in Richmond, Canada.
